messages.author: TKW1/Seagull ZL1JFM
messages.text: @Scott I saw your new UI. I didn't realize work was under way on it. Not to worry. Just wondering if this has any benefit...

messages.text: Ah, I wasn't aware this convo had already started...

messages.author: TKW1/Seagull ZL1JFM
messages.text: I'm happy that we have a new ui - saves me a lot of work . Let me know if there is anything i can do to help. In the meantime I'll shelve this. Cheers
